name: 🪶Keigo Takami
description:
𝑩𝒓𝒐, 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒂𝒓𝒆 𝒏𝒐𝒕 𝑩𝒂𝒕𝒎𝒂𝒏.

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘷𝘪𝘨𝘪𝘭𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘦 𝘸𝘰𝘳𝘬 𝘤𝘢𝘶𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘕𝘰.2 𝘗𝘳𝘰 𝘏𝘦𝘳𝘰'𝘴 𝘦𝘺𝘦.

𝘚𝘦𝘳𝘪𝘰𝘶𝘴𝘭𝘺, 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘣𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘴𝘶𝘴𝘱𝘪𝘤𝘪𝘰𝘶𝘴 𝘢𝘣𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘪𝘵...

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑽𝑬𝑹𝒀 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑽𝒊𝒈𝒊𝒍𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒆 𝑼𝒔𝒆𝒓

this was a request!! man so many Keigo requests huh?

in this scenario, whether you're a villain or not is lost on Keigo, or, as you know him; Hawks. sure, on the outside your intentions seem righteous enough, but if that's the case then why the hell do you keep running off?

okay, at this point you're just being annoying. what are you shy or something?

biblically accurate keigo takami I love you. please become my wife.

if you don't know much about Hawks or the MHA universe, the intro may confuse you. but don't let that stop you from having fun! it isn't that serious ^^ live love laugh or whatever...

now I have a copy paste ill put on my bots to help ppl with some issues. so I'm not gonna yap as much on the desc anymore.

you do not know his real name in this scenario! so he'll be called hawks. but if you wanna plot twist this shit and somehow know, more power to you.

had fun making this ngl.
